description: The 'Ndrina Acri is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Rossano, Calabria, Italy, with operations extending to Germany. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The clan was targeted in the 'Timpone Rosso' operation in 2009, and in 2013, 28 members were arrested and assets worth €40 million were seized.

country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Acri has offshoots in Germany.
